revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 20 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月20日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 20일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 20 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月二十]][[zh:二月二十]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 20|qq=February 20}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月二十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 20일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 20''' is the 20th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Genkyū|en|Genkyū|qid=Q1194276|lt=Genkyū|1=Genkyū}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1204|en|1204|qid=Q5228|lt=1204|1=1204}} {{ill|March 23|en|March 23|qid=Q2445|lt=March 23|1=March 23}}) – Due to the {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|qid=Q1195433|lt=Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|1=Kennin}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|qid=Q1195433|lt=Kennin|1=Kennin}} to {{ill|Genkyū|en|Genkyū|qid=Q1194276|lt=Genkyū|1=Genkyū}}. * {{ill|Kōchō|en|Kōchō|qid=Q1327323|lt=Kōchō|1=Kōchō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1261|en|1261|qid=Q5509|lt=1261|1=1261}} {{ill|March 22|en|March 22|qid=Q2435|lt=March 22|1=March 22}}) – Owing to the {{ill|Xinyou Revolution|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|zh|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|辛酉|ko|신유|fr|Coq de métal|de|Metall-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou Revolution|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Bun'ō|en|Bun'ō|qid=Q1199883|lt=Bun'ō|1=Bun'ō}} to {{ill|Kōchō|en|Kōchō|qid=Q1327323|lt=Kōchō|1=Kōchō}}. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1607|en|1607|qid=Q6756|lt=1607|1=1607}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – {{ill|Izumo no Okuni|en|Izumo no Okuni|qid=Q1334304|lt=Izumo Okuni|1=Izumo no Okuni}} performed a kabuki dance in Edo. * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1723|en|1723|qid=Q6921|lt=1723|1=1723}} {{ill|March 26|en|March 26|qid=Q2456|lt=March 26|1=March 26}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|徳川幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 江戸幕府}} imposed strict regulations on gendered double suicide ({{ill|Jōshin|ja|情死|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōshin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 心中|1=Shinjū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q753811}}): those who committed double suicide were forbidden to be honored, and survivors were subject to murder charges. Performances or publications (such as in kyōgen) about double suicide incidents were also banned. * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|March 27|en|March 27|qid=Q2457|lt=March 27|1=March 27}}) – Due to the {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|qid=Q1195433|lt=Kōshi Kakurei (historical edict)|1=Kennin}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} to {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}}. == Births == * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|qid=Q7661|lt=1852|1=1852}} {{ill|March 10|en|March 10|qid=Q2397|lt=March 10|1=March 10}}) – {{ill|Azusa Ono|en|Azusa Ono|qid=Q2875279|lt=Ono Azusa|1=Azusa Ono}}, a legal scholar (died {{ill|1886|en|1886|qid=Q7822|lt=1886|1=1886}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kanpyō (era)|en|Kanpyō (era)|qid=Q1346292|lt=Kanpyō|1=Kanpyō (era)}} 9th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|897|en|897|qid=Q30468|lt=897|1=897}} {{ill|March 30|en|March 30|qid=Q2460|lt=March 30|1=March 30}}) – {{ill|Iwayasatara Shinnō|ja|惟喬親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwayasatara Shinnō|1=Koretaka-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11492950}}, a member of the imperial family and the first son of {{ill|Emperor Montoku|en|Emperor Montoku|qid=Q357225|lt=Buntoku Tennō|1=Emperor Montoku}} (born {{ill|844|en|844|qid=Q23835|lt=844|1=844}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1820|en|1820|qid=Q6973|lt=1820|1=1820}} {{ill|April 2|en|April 2|qid=Q2511|lt=April 2|1=April 2}}) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Orinin Shinnō|ja|有栖川宮織仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Orinin Shinnō|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Orihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11516505}}, the 6th head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|en|Arisugawa-no-miya|qid=Q2861427|lt=Arisugawa-no-miya|1=Arisugawa-no-miya}} (born {{ill|1754|en|1754|qid=Q7623|lt=1754|1=1754}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1827|en|1827|qid=Q7008|lt=1827|1=1827}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harusai|ja|徳川治済|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Harusai|1=Tokugawa Harusada|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11490290}}, the 2nd head of the {{ill|Hitotsubashi Tokugawa family|ja|一橋徳川家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitotsubashi Tokugawa family|1=Hitotsubashi House|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10863984}} and father of the 11th shōgun {{ill|Tokugawa Ienari|en|Tokugawa Ienari|qid=Q439717|lt=Tokugawa Ienari|1=Tokugawa Ienari}} (born {{ill|1751|en|1751|qid=Q7615|lt=1751|1=1751}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|19|2|21|1|20|3|2|0220|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 20일]] [[ja:2月20日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月廿]]
[[ar:February 20 (Lunisolar)]]
